title: Images in Numbered Lists break the numbering order

posts.author: PureKrome (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
G’day! When I paste an image to the main Text Entry module of an issue or roadmap item, the image ‘breaks’ the number ordering.

for example:

image1050×665 24 KB

in the above example, this was all a single Number List with the correctly ordered numbers.

then i pasted an image into number 6. Number 7 then reset to number 1.

Sadness

posts.author: nathanhayes (Nathan Hayes)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any solution to this? It’s making some documentation very difficult.
